**Total files: 24** (21 text-based source files + 3 binary icon PNGs)

---

## 2. Config Files

### package.json
```json
{
  "name": "job-copilot",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "AI-powered job application autofiller. Bring your own LLM endpoint.",
  "main": "index.js",
  "scripts": { "test": "vitest run" },
  "type": "commonjs",
  "dependencies": {
    "chrome-launcher": "^1.2.1",
    "pdfjs-dist": "^5.7.284"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "jsdom": "^29.1.1",
    "playwright": "^1.60.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.8",
    "ws": "^8.21.0"
  }
}
```

**Dependencies:**
- **Runtime:** `chrome-launcher` (Chrome browser control), `pdfjs-dist` (PDF parsing)
- **Dev:** `playwright` (E2E testing), `vitest` (test runner), `jsdom` (DOM testing), `ws` (WebSocket)
- **No tsconfig** ‚Äî pure JavaScript, no TypeScript

### manifest.json
```json
{
  "manifest_version": 3,
  "name": "Job Copilot",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "permissions": ["storage", "activeTab", "scripting"],
  "host_permissions": ["<all_urls>"],
  "action": { "default_popup": "popup/popup.html" },
  "options_page": "options/options.html",
  "content_scripts": [{
    "matches": ["<all_urls>"],
    "js": ["lib/token-tracker.js", "lib/llm-client.js",
           "content/form-detector.js", "content/content.js"],
    "css": ["content/content.css"],
    "run_at": "document_idle"
  }],
  "background": {
    "service_worker": "background/background.js",
    "type": "module"
  }
}
```

### .gitignore
Ignores: `node_modules/`, `package-lock.json`, Chrome test profiles (`.jc-profile/`), throwaway test scripts (`jc_playwright*.js`, `jc_test*.js`, `launch_ext.mjs`, `setup_jc.mjs`, `check_ext.mjs`), `test/`, `*.png`, `.DS_Store`, `*.bak`, various Chrome profile dirs.

---

---

## 5. Architecture Overview

### Entry Points
- **Content script:** `extension/content/content.js` ‚Äî injected into every page, orchestrates all UI and filling
- **Popup:** `extension/popup/popup.html` + `.js` ‚Äî toolbar button UI
- **Options/Settings:** `extension/options/options.html` + `.js` ‚Äî profile management, LLM config, resume upload
- **Service Worker:** `extension/background/background.js` ‚Äî PDF extraction, LLM profile extraction

### Module Responsibilities

| Module | Lines | Role |
|--------|-------|------|
| `content.js` | 2,157 | Orchestrator: UI injection, fill orchestration, learning system, SPA navigation handler |
| `form-detector.js` | 938 | Pure engine: field detection (identify via weighted scoring), field filling (4 strategies per type) |
| `options.js` | 1,439 | Settings page: PDF upload, LLM extraction, profile editor, resume data editor, token display |
| `background.js` | 140 | Service worker: PDF text extraction (pdf.js), LLM profile extraction, hot-reload |
| `llm-client.js` | 110 | LLM API bridge: chat completion, answer generation, field value extraction |
| `token-tracker.js` | 80 | Token usage recording: per-model, per-day, weekly summary |
| `pdf-extract.js` | 62 | PDF text + hyperlink extraction via pdf.js |

### Data Flow
```
Resume PDF ‚Üí pdf.js ‚Üí raw text ‚Üí LLM ‚Üí structured JSON ‚Üí chrome.storage.sync
                                                                      ‚Üì
Job Page load ‚Üí content.js detect() ‚Üí inject UI ‚Üí user clicks Fill All
  ‚Üí fillPersonal() ‚Üê profile_* from storage + learned corrections
  ‚Üí fillAIQuestions() ‚Üê resume_full_data + JD ‚Üí LLM ‚Üí answers
  ‚Üí fillField() ‚Üí fillSelect() / fillTextInput() / fillOracleCombobox()
  ‚Üí listenForCorrections() ‚Üí blur ‚Üí saveLearnedCorrection()
```

### Key Technical Details
- **Pure JS** ‚Äî no TypeScript, no build step, no bundler
- **MV3 extension** ‚Äî service worker, manifest v3
- **ATS Support** ‚Äî Workday, Greenhouse, Lever, Oracle Cloud, iCIMS via generic field detection
- **Oracle CX special handling** ‚Äî Knockout.js combobox strategies, SPA mutation observer, pill buttons
- **Learning system** ‚Äî blur listeners save field corrections, merged via fieldCategoryMap cross-portal
- **Test stack** ‚Äî vitest + jsdom + playwright + chrome-launcher (end-to-end)
